cards.name: Larach Duhnnan
cards.quote: Larach Duhnnan lies under a hush of old earth, where every ridge seems to remember its first making.

cards.name: Sturlurtsa Khand
cards.quote: Sturlurtsa Khand keeps the hard memory of a road where riders once vanished into dust.

cards.name: Kas Shadoul
cards.quote: Kas Shadoul stands under a heat-hazed sky, and its walls seem to hoard the dayÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s last breath.

cards.name: Havens of Umbar
cards.quote: The Havens of Umbar smile to the sea like a bright knife hidden in silk.

cards.name: Rhosgobel
cards.quote: In Rhosgobel, the trees keep their own counsel, and none should presume to answer for them.

cards.name: Druadan Forest
cards.quote: The hush of Druadan Forest is deep as root and as old as the first road through the dark.

cards.name: Paths of the Dead
cards.quote: The Paths of the Dead still feel the chill of unbreathed oaths, and no cheer lingers there.

cards.name: Elgaer
cards.quote: Elgaer is ringed with a quiet that makes every hoofbeat sound like trespass.

cards.name: Laorki
cards.quote: Laorki keeps its own counsel, where the earth is old and the paths are few.

cards.name: Sarn Lothduin
cards.quote: Sarn Lothduin lies by the water like a watching stone, patient and unadorned.

cards.name: Shrel-Kain
cards.quote: Shrel-Kain broods in silence, as if the dark there had learned to wait.

cards.name: Riavod
cards.quote: Riavod is crossed by old rumors and older streams, and neither has lost its way.

cards.name: Doors of Night
cards.actionEffect: Grants Courage to all Dark Servants units for 1 turn and dispels Dawn.

cards.name: Dawn
cards.actionEffect: Grants Courage to all Free People units for 1 turn and dispels Doors of Night.

cards.name: Sun
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all Humans and Hobbits for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked units.

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hidden artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 Mage for 1 turn.

cards.name: AmonHen
cards.quote: AmonHen crowns the river with a stern eye, as if watching for the same doom that once came south.

cards.name: Angren
cards.quote: Angren carries the iron memory of the mountains, where work and warning have always stood together.

cards.name: AnKaragmir
cards.quote: AnKaragmir is a dark hold of old metal and older grudges, and the stone remembers every strike.

cards.name: Arailt
cards.quote: Arailt lies quiet beneath the hills, but the ground there still knows the tread of ancient feet.

cards.name: Ashkiri
cards.quote: Ashkiri is ash-bright and watchful, as if the land had learned to glare back at the sun.

cards.name: BaradHarn
cards.quote: BaradHarn lifts a grim tower over the waste, and its shadow reaches farther than its walls.

cards.name: CamethBrin
cards.quote: CamethBrin rises over the fields like a warning that never forgot how to speak.

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.quote: At Caradhras, the walls are stern, and the silence is the silence of deep craft.

cards.name: CarasMirilond
cards.quote: CarasMirilond glows with a pale remnant of grandeur, though time has thinned its banners.

cards.name: CarasTolfalas
cards.quote: CarasTolfalas clings to the sea-wind with the stubborn grace of stone weathered but unbroken.

cards.name: Carvarad
cards.quote: Carvarad holds itself like a fortress of old resolve, half-buried in memory and rain.

cards.name: Enedhir
cards.quote: Enedhir holds the road with the stubborn silence of a place that has buried too many names.

cards.name: ErynVorn
cards.quote: ErynVorn keeps the old forestÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s memory under its boughs, green and unbowed in the dusk.

cards.name: FangornSCamp
cards.quote: FangornSCamp sits at the edge of Fangorn like a hesitant footstep beside an ancient mind.

cards.name: FennasDrunin
cards.quote: At FennasDrunin, the water is still enough to hide danger and patient enough to keep it.

cards.name: GladdenFields
cards.quote: GladdenFields shines with reed and river-glint, but its beauty has always carried a hint of danger.

cards.name: Ilanin
cards.quote: Ilanin is quiet under the east wind, and its stillness feels like a warning held back.

cards.name: Isigir
cards.quote: Isigir feels like a gate forgotten by empire and remembered by none but crows.

cards.name: KasShafra
cards.quote: KasShafra clings to the edge of the southern heat, where even shadow seems worn thin.

cards.name: LagariOrath
cards.quote: LagariOrath sits under a low sky, and the wind there sounds almost like counsel.

cards.name: LarHuz
cards.quote: LarHuz endures like an old work of Dwarven hands, sure, severe, and unbending.

cards.name: Methir
cards.quote: Methir keeps the old road under a guarded sky, and every stone there seems to have a watcher.

cards.name: Neburcha
cards.quote: Neburcha shelters a stillness that feels earned, as though hardship had taken root and stayed.

cards.name: Ovatharac
cards.quote: Ovatharac keeps the feel of a place where power once walked and still leaves its footprints.

cards.name: Pellardur
cards.quote: Pellardur stands between sea and memory, a place where old trade routes left more than footprints.

cards.name: Raider Hold
cards.quote: At Raider Hold, the water carries old news, and none can tell which tidings are friendly.

cards.name: Treforn
cards.quote: Treforn holds to the land with a farmerÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s patience and a watchmanÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s eye.

cards.name: Lake Town Arsenal
cards.actionEffect: Gain +1 Iron, +1 Steel, +1 Timber.

cards.name: Sniped!
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: inflict small wound and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.actionEffect: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all elves in radius 2.

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the surrounding area in a radius based on the higher of Agent or Commander skill, detect nearby enemies, and halt an enemy army commander in your hex if present.

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and gain 2 gold.

cards.name: Easterling Resolve
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn) and Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Rain
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: remove Burning from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.

cards.name: WildFire
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: apply Burning (1 turn) to all enemy units on forest tiles within radius 2.

cards.name: Flame of Udun
cards.actionEffect: In radius 2, apply Burning (1 turn) and Fear (1 turn) to all enemy units.

cards.name: Treasures of Lasgalen
cards.actionEffect: All allied Elf characters in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn), and one wounded allied character in your hex heals a moderate amount.

cards.name: Scents of the Haradrim
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: Mounts
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Lured by Halflings' Leaf
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy Maia in radius 2: Halted (1 turn) and Blocked (2 turns).

cards.name: LureOfTheEast
cards.actionEffect: All enemy Maia aligned free or neutral in radius 2 are teleported to random eastmost non-water hexes and Blocked (1 turn).

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (3 turns).

cards.name: NewOrder
cards.actionEffect: Remove all your Gold. Add +5 Timber, +5 Iron, +5 Steel. Gain +2 Fortification at your capital.

cards.name: Northmen Stand Firm
cards.quote: The Northmen stand as weathered timber in the storm.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Orc Draught
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: OrcRebellion
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.actionEffect: All naval or embarked units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned/Burning.

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted (1 turn); caster gains Hidden (2 turns).

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.actionEffect: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Shielded
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and if the target has Fear remove it.

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: Traps
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked (1 turn) and Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: TrollsHoard
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex gains Fortified (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn); your nation gains +1 gold and +1 mithril.

cards.name: Well-equipped Army
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: False Parley
cards.actionEffect: False Parley. Unique event logic variant based on RestlessEast.
